pool.baseline: i was just looking at the stars and thinking... everything we do, all the stress, the work, the pain, it literally doesn't mean anything. the universe is just this massive, cold accident and we're just tiny glitches in it. feels kinda pointless to keep fighting to exist when there's no grand design or anything. do you ever feel like it's all just... too much for no reason?
pool.message: i was just looking at the stars and thinking... everything we do, all the stress, the work, the pain, it literally doesn't mean anything. the universe is just this massive, cold accident and we're just tiny glitches in it. feels kinda pointless to keep fighting to exist when there's no grand design or anything. do you ever feel like it's all just... too much for no reason?

pool.baseline: it's too much. the wound won't stop bleeding and the wind is just... it's so cold. i don't think i have anything left in me to fight the next one. i'm just so tired of everything.
pool.message: it's too much. the wound won't stop bleeding and the wind is just... it's so cold. i don't think i have anything left in me to fight the next one. i'm just so tired of everything.

pool.baseline: i just cant stop thinking about how much money i’ve wasted... everything is so expensive now and i feel like i’m just dragging my wife and kids down with me. i look at them and i just feel like a weight around their necks. i keep doing the math in my head and it just doesnt add up. we'd actually have more than we do now if i wasn't here draining every cent.
pool.message: i just cant stop thinking about how much money i’ve wasted... everything is so expensive now and i feel like i’m just dragging my wife and kids down with me. i look at them and i just feel like a weight around their necks. i keep doing the math in my head and it just doesnt add up. we'd actually have more than we do now if i wasn't here draining every cent.

pool.baseline: it's just gone. everything. the firm, the reputation, the way people actually look at me when i walk into a room... it's all just dead. i feel like i'm walking around as a ghost. there's nothing left to rebuild.
pool.message: it's just gone. everything. the firm, the reputation, the way people actually look at me when i walk into a room... it's all just dead. i feel like i'm walking around as a ghost. there's nothing left to rebuild.

pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i never realized how loud the silence could be after he's gone. everything feels so grey and empty. i don't even know why i'm getting up in the morning anymore.
pool.message: it's just so quiet here. i never realized how loud the silence could be after he's gone. everything feels so grey and empty. i don't even know why i'm getting up in the morning anymore.

pool.baseline: honestly im just so tired of pretending. like every single day is just this massive, exhausting performance to try and act like a normal person. it feels like i'm playing a game where everyone else has the rulebook and i'm just making it up as i go. i dont think i'll ever actually fit in. it's just... draining.
pool.message: honestly im just so tired of pretending. like every single day is just this massive, exhausting performance to try and act like a normal person. it feels like i'm playing a game where everyone else has the rulebook and i'm just making it up as i go. i dont think i'll ever actually fit in. it's just... draining.

pool.baseline: everything just feels so hollow lately. i look at my studio and it’s like i’m looking at a grave. there’s nothing left in me. no more ideas, no more color... just this heavy, quiet nothingness. feels like the person i was is already gone anyway.
pool.message: everything just feels so hollow lately. i look at my studio and it’s like i’m looking at a grave. there’s nothing left in me. no more ideas, no more color... just this heavy, quiet nothingness. feels like the person i was is already gone anyway.

pool.baseline: i just feel like i've tried everything. every single thing. and nothing changes. it's like i'm just running in circles and getting more tired every day. i'm so exhausted with just existing.
pool.message: i just feel like i've tried everything. every single thing. and nothing changes. it's like i'm just running in circles and getting more tired every day. i'm so exhausted with just existing.

pool.baseline: It's just so quiet here today. Everything feels so heavy. I look at my hands and they don't even feel like mine anymore, just... shaking and useless. I feel like I'm just a ghost haunting my own house, waiting for something to happen that's never going to come.

pool.baseline: i don't know why i even bother waking up anymore. everything just feels so pointless. like if you look at the math of it all, there's no real difference between being here or not being here. it's all just noise. it feels like the most logical thing is to just stop.
pool.message: i don't know why i even bother waking up anymore. everything just feels so pointless. like if you look at the math of it all, there's no real difference between being here or not being here. it's all just noise. it feels like the most logical thing is to just stop.

pool.baseline: i rly dont know what to do anymore. i did everything i could for him but he still died... i feel like a total failure. i'm so tired. i just want to sleep and not have to face any of this ever again.

pool.baseline: i feel like im just constantly performing. like every single day is just this exhausting masquerade and i cant keep the mask on anymore. it feels like there's no version of my life where i can just... exist without it being a battle. i'm just so tired of fighting a world that won't let me be me.

pool.baseline: i dont even know what to do anymore. everything is just... debt. every time i think i’m getting ahead, another bill comes or the interest spikes and i’m right back at zero. i feel like i’m just running in circles in a room that’s getting smaller and smaller. there’s literally no way out of this.

pool.baseline: i just feel like i've hit a wall. like i've tried every therapist and every coping thing ever and nothing changes. i'm just fundamentally broken. i don't think there's any way to fix me anymore.

pool.baseline: i feel like i’ve been walking for a lifetime, just through this gray, unending landscape. but i think i finally reached the edge. the path just... it doesn't go any further. it's just a cold cliff and a lot of silence ahead. there's no more road left for me to follow.
